title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CRISIL - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
